Replaced the runtime lane’s stub gate in [fabro/checks/chain-runtime-reset.sh](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM6ZFDDEXKQB27C3Y3WSP01R/worktree/fabro/checks/chain-runtime-reset.sh) with the approved Slice 1 proof: it now runs the `myosu-chain-common`, `myosu-chain`, and `myosu-runtime` offline checks, builds `myosu-runtime` in release mode, and asserts the three Wasm artifacts exist.
